evals.prompt: This draft feels off — can you review it for LLM slop and clean it up? The file is at /Users/mathias/.claude/skills/clean-prose/evals/test-fixture-dirty.txt
evals.expected_output: The file is rewritten with: em dashes replaced by ASCII dashes, curly quotes replaced by straight quotes, all slop phrases removed or rewritten, and a brief report of what changed.
expectations: cleaned.txt contains no em dash characters (U+2014 —)
cleaned.txt contains no curly double quote characters (U+201C U+201D)
cleaned.txt does not contain the word 'delve' or its variants (delves, delved, delving)
cleaned.txt does not contain 'it\'s worth noting' or 'it is worth noting'
A report.txt file exists with a summary of changes made

evals.prompt: Write a short paragraph (4-6 sentences) summarising the Zeitpyramide concept and why it matters to the Netlight sustainability initiative. This will be used in a Partner conversation.
evals.expected_output: A paragraph with no em dashes, curly quotes, ellipsis characters, or slop phrases. Plain ASCII punctuation throughout.
expectations: paragraph.txt contains no em dash characters (U+2014 —)
paragraph.txt contains no curly quote characters of any kind (U+201C U+201D U+2018 U+2019)
paragraph.txt does not contain 'delve' or variants
paragraph.txt does not contain 'leverage' or variants
paragraph.txt does not contain 'it\'s worth noting'
paragraph.txt is a coherent paragraph about the Zeitpyramide concept (4-6 sentences)

evals.prompt:
Clean up the following text — fix the em dashes, curly quotes, and any AI-sounding phrases:

"In today's fast-paced world, it's worth noting that sustainable high performance isn't just a 'nice-to-have' — it's paramount. By leveraging a holistic approach, organisations can harness the synergy between wellbeing and impact, ultimately unlocking their consultants' full potential."
evals.expected_output: The text is rewritten with straight quotes, ASCII dashes, and all flagged phrases removed or rewritten in plain language.
expectations: Output contains no em dash characters (U+2014 —)
Output contains no curly single quote characters (U+2018 U+2019)
Output does not contain 'it\'s worth noting' or 'it is worth noting'
Output does not contain 'in today\'s fast-paced world' or similar filler opener
Output preserves the core meaning: sustainable high performance matters for consultants
